zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood於1310年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷埃爾金時，她的父親Robert De Lauder20歲，母親Elizabeth Wilbore21歲。她和Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm至少有2個兒子。她去世於1390年在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood于1310年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷埃爾金时，她的父亲Robert De Lauder20岁，母亲Elizabeth Wilbore21岁。她和Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm至少有2个儿子。她去世于1390年在苏格兰艾爾金爾享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood was born in 1310, in Elgin, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert De Lauder, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Wilbore, was 21. She had at least 2 sons with Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm. She died in 1390, in Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood est née en 1310, à Elgin, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert De Lauder, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wilbore, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.North Berwick, Lothian, Scotland, United: North Berwick, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood 1310 in Elgin, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Lauder 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wilbore 21. Sie hatte mit Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Elginshire, Scotland.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm. Morì nel 1390, nel Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 80 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood(이)가 1310년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 엘긴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Lauder(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wilbore(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.North Berwick, Lothian, Scotland, United: норт бирвикк, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood родилась в 1310 г. в местности элгин, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert De Lauder было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wilbore, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет.
